dynamic-element.name: content
dynamic-element.dynamic-content:
For more information from what can be loaded check here:  https://github.com/liferay/liferay-portal/tree/master/modules/apps/site-initializer/site-initializer-extender/site-initializer-extender-test-bundle-1/src/main/resources/site-initializer

Site Initializer is not the final solution, it's an alternative to batch to fill the product gap.
